content.text: REVIEW-PASS: 5.6.1 / 5.6.3 — Uses `SKStoreReviewController.requestReview` gated only by workout count (ReviewManager.swift:11); the App Store link in ShareSheet.swift:6 is a plain store page (not a `write-review` deep link), and no "rate 5 stars" or feature-gating copy appears in description.txt.
